candidate_a.title: Substack Monetization Audits
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Creators struggling to convert free subscribers into paid members
candidate_a.core_concept: A manual 10-point audit tool focused purely on the 'pricing page' conversion funnel
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Audit reports delivered via Loom video analyzing email sign-up landing page effectiveness
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Ten free experimental audits performed for beta users

candidate_b.title: Substack Monetization Audits
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Creators struggling to convert free subscribers into paid members
candidate_b.core_concept: A structured 10-point audit framework specifically for Substack pricing page conversion.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A specialized consulting service providing a standardized 10-point audit of Substack landing pages to improve conversion rates.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Perform 10 manual audits for free in exchange for testimonials and case studies. | Define the 10-point audit criteria.; Identify 20 potential Substack creators.; Conduct 10 audits via Loom video.; Collect feedback and conversion data.

candidate_a.title: Remote Heritage Immersion Kitchen
candidate_a.target_user: Expats seeking nostalgia and traditional cooking comfort
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Failure of traditional catering to capture regional specific 'feel' of comfort home-cooking
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A platform connecting heritage cooks with home cooks for live, remote cooking sessions.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Facilitate 5 live video cooking sessions between heritage cooks and home cooks. | Recruit 2 heritage cooks; Recruit 5 home cooks; Facilitate 5 sessions; Gather feedback on the 'heritage' experience

candidate_b.title: Remote Heritage Immersion Kitchen
candidate_b.target_user: Expats seeking nostalgia and traditional cooking comfort
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Failure of traditional catering to capture regional specific 'feel' of comfort home-cooking
candidate_b.core_concept: Crowdsourced historical cook books localized into professional recipe standards by diaspora community cooks
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Pairing a certified older migrant cook to coach the home visitor remotely over real-time guidance tools as the customer actually prepares their own specialized regional dish
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Test sessions where five experts use standardized remote interface pads to walk households through four heritage dumpling recipes

candidate_a.title: Tech Stacks Lifecycle Steward
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Underutilized 'seat licenses' contributing to phantom software spending.
candidate_a.core_concept: Continuous entitlement auditing via automated API connection to single sign-on access logs.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Periodic cross-comparison of user access timestamps against user seating assignment lists, highlighting license retirement recommendations.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Script that performs a one-time automated scan of two disparate identity management SaaS platform usage records.

candidate_b.title: Tech Stacks Lifecycle Steward
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Underutilized 'seat licenses' contributing to phantom software spending.
candidate_b.core_concept: Cross-referencing user access logs with license assignments to identify unused seats.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A tool that ingests exported CSVs from SSO and SaaS platforms to identify inactive users.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A script that takes two CSV files (user list and access logs) and outputs a list of potential license reclamation candidates. | Define CSV schema for SSO/SaaS exports; Develop matching logic; Build report generator; Test with synthetic data

candidate_a.title: Brand Integrity Monitoring
candidate_a.target_user: Service providers with paid media ads
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Brand advertising displaying alongside unsuitable or scammy link farms
candidate_a.core_concept: Monitoring mechanism specific to detecting when client URLs are appearing on bad reputation host platforms
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Exclusion list sync protocol keeping ad-network blocks consistent across platforms
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Report utility highlighting current placements to the store owner once per month

candidate_b.title: Brand Integrity Monitoring
candidate_b.target_user: Service providers with paid media ads
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Brand advertising displaying alongside unsuitable or scammy link farms
candidate_b.core_concept: Monthly reporting on ad placements on low-reputation sites.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A service providing monthly reports to store owners identifying where their ads are appearing on low-reputation sites.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Manual monthly report generation for 5 clients. | Identify 5 clients.; Perform manual placement audits.; Deliver monthly reports.; Gather feedback.

candidate_a.title: Micro-Influencer Agreement Gen
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Excessive manual effort preparing contracts and performance requirements for smaller-scale influencers
candidate_a.core_concept: Modular contract generator for barter/equity influencer deals.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A tool providing modular contract templates for small-scale influencer partnerships, focusing on barter and equity terms.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A PDF contract engine with adjustable variables. | Draft modular contract templates.; Create a simple PDF generator.; Test with 3 creators.; Gather feedback.

candidate_b.title: Micro-Influencer Agreement Gen
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Excessive manual effort preparing contracts and performance requirements for smaller-scale influencers
candidate_b.core_concept: Modular snippet editor for legally compliant barter-based or equity influencer deals
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Logic-based document generator for specific project types in the creative domain
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Simple PDF contract engine with adjustable performance tracking variables
